title: Extended: supplyChain (v0.1)
description: Audience-neutral declaration of the supply chain underlying the subject — what models, tools, data, dependencies, and upstream attestations the system relies on. All arrays are OPEN — implementers categorise components as their inventory practice prescribes. Carried under the Pack envelope's 'extended.supplyChain' field.

models.description: Foundation models in use. Open shape per item. Conventional fields: 'name', 'version', 'provider', 'modelCard' (uri), 'trainingDataDescription', 'license'.

tools.description: Tools the subject uses. Each item MAY be a URI (typically a toolId matching a project.tool.registered event) or an open-shape object with more detail. Conventional object fields: 'toolRef' (uri), 'name', 'provider'.

dataSources.description: Data sources — training data for issuer-trained models, operational data inputs, retrieval corpora. Open shape per item. Conventional fields: 'name', 'type' (e.g. 'training', 'operational', 'retrieval'), 'provider', 'license', 'dataCard' (uri), 'collectionPeriod'.

dependencies.description: Software dependencies (libraries, SDKs), infrastructure providers, and other AI systems consumed. Open shape per item. Conventional fields: 'name', 'version', 'provider', 'type' (e.g. 'library', 'sdk', 'sub-agent', 'infrastructure'), 'license'.

attestations.description: Upstream attestations received from suppliers — SBOMs, SLSA provenance, model cards, data cards, supplier audit reports. Open shape per item. Conventional fields: 'type' (e.g. 'SBOM', 'SLSA-L3', 'model_card', 'data_card', 'audit_report'), 'uri', 'hash', 'validFrom', 'validUntil', 'issuer'. These form the chain-of-trust upstream of this Pack — verifiers MAY follow them to validate provenance claims.
